category_sources: Official README says Style Dictionary uses design tokens to define styles once and export them to many platforms.
source_facts.description says it is a build system for creating cross-platform styles.
display_name_sources: Official repository README heading uses Style Dictionary.
docs_sources: Official repository README links to styledictionary.com as documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository URL.
tags_sources: Official README describes design tokens, CLI use, and exports for iOS, Android, CSS, JS, HTML, and documentation.
source_facts.description identifies cross-platform style build functionality.
